protocol.name: DCRM-1 — Dispersion-Conditioned Cross-Alt Residual Momentum
protocol.claim: A weekly beta-residual 30-day cross-alt momentum spread persists for seven days, while a strictly-prior dispersion state identifies weeks that should carry only quarter gross rather than full gross.

evidence_boundary.selection_basis: quarter gross preserved 92 support events versus 59 under abstention; no post-entry price or return was calculated

novelty_boundary.versus_rex: cross-alt weekly rank, not BTC price-action exhaustion/reclaim
novelty_boundary.versus_oi_funding_premium_kimchi: uses no OI, funding signal, premium index, spot premium, Kimchi, FX, or DXY
novelty_boundary.versus_lore_lorc_cres: 30-day residual continuation with a weekly clock, not short-horizon residual exhaustion, continuation event, or expert switcher
novelty_boundary.versus_current_active_portfolio: one market-neutral alt pair, no BTC position, low weekly turnover, and a distinct seven-day holding interval
novelty_boundary.not_globally_orthogonal: shares six-alt residual/beta machinery with LORE/LORC; outcome-blind clock overlap and eventual PnL correlation must be reported

universe.position: one long alt and one short alt; no BTC leg

source_contract.funding: exact reported rate and millisecond settlement timestamp per held symbol

feature_formula.last_observable_bar: Sunday 23:55 UTC 5m bar, completed at Monday 00:00
feature_formula.row_cutoff: latest feature row open timestamp is decision_time - 5m; every market row with timestamp >= decision_time is forbidden
feature_formula.hourly_return: log ratio of consecutive completed xx:55 5m closes
feature_formula.factor: per-symbol median completed hourly return of the other five alts
feature_formula.factor_30d: sum of that symbol-specific leave-one-out hourly factor over the 720 completed hours ending at t-5m
feature_formula.score: symbol 30-day return - clipped beta * symbol-specific factor_30d
feature_formula.dispersion: population standard deviation of the six scores
feature_formula.gross_scale: 1.0 when current dispersion <= strictly-prior q80; otherwise 0.25
feature_formula.base_weights: positive gross-one weights solving long_beta*w_long = short_beta*w_short
feature_formula.executed_weights: base long and short weights multiplied by gross_scale

clock.same_boundary_order: close old pair before opening the new pair
clock.backtest_fill_proxy: exact Monday 00:05 5m open; no signal uses that row or any later row
clock.live_fill_contract: marketable orders during a fixed five-minute window beginning 00:05; partial or missed fills are logged and never backfilled or repaired
clock.same_timestamp_funding: funding at Monday 00:00 precedes the new entry and belongs only to an already-held pair

execution.cost_applied: entry and exit on each leg, proportional to absolute notional
execution.funding_completeness: no forward fill; a missing expected held funding settlement on either leg invalidates the evaluation rather than silently skipping a trade
execution.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry HWM, entry/exit and hypothetical liquidation cost, funding cash, and held favorable-before-adverse two-leg OHLC; funding credits cannot create an intratrade favorable peak
execution.cagr: full declared wall-clock including warm-up, idle cash, and low-gross weeks

controls_not_repair_candidates: entry and exit delayed five minutes
ten basis points per notional side
dispersion scaling disabled at full gross

orthogonality_after_standalone_pass.compare_against: all promoted/live sleeves on one synchronized strict ledger

research_context.version_note: The 2026 dispersion and realism papers are recent working papers; they motivate a falsifiable test and do not establish this implementation's alpha.

protocol.stop_rule: Reject before outcomes if support fails. Open 2023 once only; if any frozen selection gate fails, retire without opening 2024 or changing sign, lookback, hold, scale, pair rule, or beta. Open 2024 only after a complete 2023 pass, then 2025 and 2026 sequentially. Test portfolio orthogonality only after the standalone candidate passes.
